rationale: The citing paper is a behavioral-economics tutorial whose core constructs explicitly include reference dependence and loss aversion, and it states that it contrasts model predictions with prior experimental evidence. The cited paper is a direct empirical/conceptual study on the boundaries of loss aversion (endowment effect, WTA/WTP, risky vs. riskless exchange), so it is plausibly a substantive theory/evidence source rather than an incidental mention.
